connecting-country.description: The country from which the bot connection originated.

connecting-isp.description: The ISP for the source IP address of the bad bot.

device-os.description: The operating system of the device used by the bad bot, as inferred from the user-agent or other signals.

ip-src.description: The source IP address of the bad bot.

risk-rule.description: A risk rule or detection rule that matched this bot, such as a warninglist hit, threat intel rule, or custom detection signature.

user-agent.description: The user-agent string presented by the bad bot. Multiple user-agents may be observed from the same source IP.

description: A bad bot observed making requests, including its source IP, user-agent strings, connecting country, device OS, connecting ISP, and associated risk rules.
name: bad-bot
